title: litosanthes subspicata
intro: Litosanthes subspicata, also known as the Java spikerush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, Litosanthes subspicata has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Litosanthes subspicata are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
